query:
SELECT 
  o.orderNo,
  o.deliveryCity,
  o.courseAmount,
  o.teacherFee,
  c.partnerFeeRate
FROM orders o
LEFT JOIN cityPartnerConfig c ON o.deliveryCity = c.city
WHERE o.orderNo IN (
  'ORD1767678237612462',
  'ORD1767678237579364',
  'ORD1767678237543988',
  'ORD1767678237511535',
  'ORD1767678237479657',
  'ORD1767678237445231',
  'ORD1767678237410451',
  'ORD1767678237394316'
)
ORDER BY o.orderNo;
